200.description: Result download link (standard) or compound manifest

downloadUrl.description: Pre-signed URL to download the result file. Expires after 1 hour.

data.description: Download information for a completed task result
data.title: TaskResultDownload

anyOf.description: Success envelope containing a download link for a task result
anyOf.title: TaskResultResponse

status.description: Task lifecycle state: waiting (pending dependencies), queued (in queue), processing (actively computing), completed (result available), failed (error occurred), cancelled (user-cancelled), expired (result TTL exceeded)
status.title: TaskStatus

downloadUrls.description: Download URLs keyed by format (only if completed)

items.description: Status/result info for one sub-task in a compound manifest
items.title: CompoundResultEntry

data.description: Result manifest for a completed compound task
data.title: CompoundResultManifest

anyOf.description: Success envelope containing the compound task result manifest with per-sub-task download links
anyOf.title: CompoundResultManifestResponse

schema.description: Result download link for standard tasks, or a compound manifest with per-sub-task download links
schema.title: TaskOrCompoundResultResponse

error.description: Structured error information with machine-readable code and optional debugging context
error.title: ErrorDetail

error.description: Structured error information with machine-readable code and optional debugging context
error.title: ErrorDetail
